scripts.dev:all: dotenv -e apps/admin-panel/.env.local -- concurrently -n ui,gateway -c blue,green "pnpm --dir apps/admin-panel dev" "BASE_PATH=/gateway PORT=4001 MONGODB_URI=$SAFEZONE_DB_URI pnpm --dir services/innotech-gateway dev"
scripts.dev:full: dotenv -e apps/admin-panel/.env.local -- concurrently -n ui,gateway,logging -c blue,green,magenta "pnpm --dir apps/admin-panel exec next dev -H 0.0.0.0 -p 3000" "BASE_PATH=/gateway PORT=4001 MONGODB_URI=$SAFEZONE_DB_URI pnpm --dir services/innotech-gateway dev" "pnpm --dir services/logging-data-extraction dev"
